name: Sure.jell® Nutty Professor's Cherry Jam
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds fully ripe sweet cherries, about
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit and finely chop cherries. Measure 4 cups into a 6-8 quart saucepot.
2. Add pecans, lemon peel, and juice and almond extract to the fruit mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, measure sugar (scrape excess sugar from the cup with a spatula to level for exact measure).
4. Stir the fruit pectin into the fruit mixture in the saucepot.
5. Add butter.
6. Bring the mixture to a full rolling boil on high heat, stirring constantly.
7. Quickly stir in all sugar.
8. Return to a full rolling boil and boil exactly 1 minute, stirring constantly.
9. Remove from heat. Skim off foam with a metal spoon.
10. Ladle quickly into hot sterilized jars, filling to within 1/8 inch of the top.
11. Wipe jar rims and threads. Cover with two-piece lids and screw bands tightly.
12. Invert jars for 5 minutes, then turn upright. After jars cool, check seals.
